2606.24773.title: Posterior Refinement: Fast Language Generation via Any-Order Flow Maps
2606.24773.paper_summary: Non-autoregressive generation offers a powerful paradigm for iterative refinement, allowing models to recursively critique, erase and regenerate arbitrary subsets of tokens. However, existing non-autoregressive models fail to realize this potential. Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) suffer from factorization error, causing sample quality to collapse when generating multiple tokens simultaneously. Flow Map Language Models (FMLMs) circumvent this bottleneck via joint sequence transport for excellent few-step generation, but sacrifice the inference-time flexibility of MDMs. We introduce FMLM+, a framework that bridges this gap by equipping FMLM with masking-style noise schedules. While generating the full sequence in a single step, FMLM+ simultaneously scores the global consistency of each token a posteriori. We leverage this to introduce Posterior Refinement, a novel inference-time refinement strategy that enables the model to adaptively self-correct its outputs, matching the performance of discrete baselines with 32x fewer NFEs. Across diverse benchmarks, we demonstrate that FMLM+ with Posterior Refinement improves the speed--quality tradeoff over both MDM and FMLM families, providing a scalable foundation for high-fidelity language modeling.
2606.24773.paper_summary_zh: 非自回歸生成提供了一種強大的迭代精煉範式，允許模型遞歸地批評、刪除和再生任意子集的標記。<lb/>然而，現有的非自回歸模型未能實現這一潛力。<lb/>遮罩擴散模型（MDMs）受到因子化錯誤的影響，導致在同時生成多個標記時樣本質量崩潰。<lb/>流映射語言模型（FMLMs）通過聯合序列傳輸來繞過這一瓶頸，實現出色的少步生成，但犧牲了MDMs的推理時間靈活性。<lb/>我們引入了FMLM+，這是一個通過為FMLM配備遮罩式噪聲時間表來彌合這一差距的框架。<lb/>在單一步驟中生成完整序列的同時，FMLM+還對每個標記的全局一致性進行了後驗評分。<lb/>我們利用這一點引入了後驗精煉，這是一種新穎的推理時間精煉策略，使模型能夠自適應地自我修正其輸出，達到與離散基準相匹配的性能，且所需的NFEs少了32倍。<lb/>在各種基準測試中，我們證明了FMLM+與後驗精煉在速度與質量的權衡上優於MDM和FMLM系列，為高保真語言建模提供了一個可擴展的基礎。
2606.24773.author: Manan Agarwal et.al.
2606.24773.authors: Manan Agarwal, Sheel Shah, Chanhyuk Lee, Jaehoon Yoo, Jerry Huang, Seunghoon Hong, Aditi Raghunathan, Jinwoo Kim, Nicholas M. Boffi
